one_time_description: Impairment on investment in Nations Cannabis Holdings Limited Partnership for full $1,500,000 invested; also treaty loan forgiveness of $1,079,074 recognized as income
economic_notes: Rainbow Gas Bar announced cessation of active operations on June 25, 2021 subsequent to year end. Band invested $1,500,000 in Nations Cannabis Holdings Limited Partnership during the year. Burns Lake Community Forest generated $368,047. Coastal Gas Link payments received.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to observe physical inventory count. Comparative 2019 figures restated due to Key-oh Lodge being reclassified from modified equity to full consolidation. Treaty loan forgiveness of $1,079,074 from Carrier Sekani Tribal Council recognized as income. $1,500,000 investment in Nations Cannabis Holdings LP fully impaired. Consolidated entities include Ts'il Kaz Koh Development Corporation (100%) and Ts'il Kaz Koh Development Limited Partnership (75% proportionate consolidation). Turtle Island Land Management Corporation Ltd. is a GBE on modified equity basis but is inactive. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $461,344 + CMHC $18,381 + CSFS $172,665 + FHNA $174,911 + Ottawa Trust Fund $47,385 + PGNAETA $36,619 + CSTC $64,630 + Province of BC $2,415,113 + MCFD $384,270 + treaty loan forgiveness $1,079,074 = but treaty loan forgiveness is in Other income so total_government_transfers excludes it: $461,344+$18,381+$172,665+$174,911+$47,385+$36,619+$64,630+$2,415,113+$384,270 = $3,775,318 less PGNAETA reclassification; using sum of identified government transfers: 461344+18381+172665+174911+47385+36619+64630+2415113+384270 = 3775318; osr = 9532329-3775318 = 5757011. No schedule of remuneration provided.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
